productDisplayName: Myntra Men's Radio Head Yellow T-shirt
description: CompositionYellow round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with chest print Fitting Comfort Wash care Light machine wash Do not bleach Warm iron on reverse Do not dry clean Dry flat/reverse Do not scrub Talk of the cosmopolitan who loves to fight for his country, while he enjoys music, nature, love and laughter, and there's no better way to prove that you are one such person who comes straight out of the Radiohead hit number "Man-o-war", with this yellow myntra t-shirt.
